questions.question: Explain the man-in-the-middle vulnerability in basic Diffie-Hellman key exchange and how it can be mitigated.
expectedPoints: Attacker can intercept and replace public values
Solution: add authentication through digital signatures or PKI

questions.question: Describe the complete process of symmetric key distribution using a Key Distribution Center (KDC), including the steps involved and how security is maintained.
expectedPoints: User requests session key from KDC
KDC generates session key encrypted with user's key
KDC sends ticket encrypted with recipient's key
Both parties decrypt their messages to obtain session key
Security relies on KDC being trusted and keys being secure
Disadvantages: single point of failure, performance bottleneck
